title: Spero Tebipenem Phase 3 Halted Early for Efficacy
headline: Spero Therapeutics stock soared 245% after Phase 3 PIVOT-PO trial of tebipenem HBr met non-inferiority to IV imipenem-cilastatin in complicated UTIs, with potential for first oral carbapenem approval.
key_facts: Stock: $0.68→$2.35 (245% gain); Non-inferiority margin: 10%; Primary endpoint met vs IV imipenem-cilastatin; GSK partnership; First oral carbapenem for cUTI if approved

title: GSK/Ionis Bepirovirsen Achieves 'Functional Cure' in HBV
headline: GSK and Ionis reported Phase 3 B-Well 1 and B-Well 2 data for bepirovirsen, achieving unprecedented functional cure rates in chronic hepatitis B with Breakthrough Therapy Designation.
key_facts: B-Well 1 and B-Well 2 Phase 3 positive topline (announced Jan 7, 2026; detailed May 28); Breakthrough Therapy Designation; Priority Review; Functional cure rates; ~300M HBV patients globally

title: AstraZeneca Imfinzi Wins Second Bladder Cancer FDA OK
headline: FDA approved AstraZeneca's Imfinzi (durvalumab) as first immunotherapy combination regimen for high-risk non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC).
key_facts: Second bladder cancer indication for Imfinzi; First immunotherapy combo for high-risk NMIBC; Competitive with Merck Keytruda in genitourinary oncology

title: CVS Adds Lilly Obesity Drugs to Formulary
headline: CVS Health added Eli Lilly's Zepbound (tirzepatide) and Foundayo to formulary coverage, putting Lilly on equal competitive footing with Novo Nordisk's Wegovy.
key_facts: CVS formulary coverage for Zepbound and Foundayo; Material revenue catalyst for Lilly; Positions Lilly vs Novo Nordisk on major PBM

title: AbbVie ADC Wins FDA Approval for Ultra-Rare Blood Cancer
headline: AbbVie received FDA approval for an antibody-drug conjugate from its ImmunoGen acquisition portfolio targeting an ultra-rare blood cancer.
key_facts: ImmunoGen-derived asset; Ultra-rare blood cancer indication; Follows AbbVie's ImmunoGen $10.1B acquisition; Multiple approved products now emerging from deal portfolio

title: BridgeBio BBP-418 Shows Positive LGMD Phase 3 Data
headline: BridgeBio reported positive Phase 3 interim FORTIFY results for oral BBP-418 in limb-girdle muscular dystrophy type 2I/R9, with plans to file FDA approval in 2026.
key_facts: Phase 3 FORTIFY interim data; Improved mobility and reduced muscle damage biomarkers; First-in-disease approved therapy (no current approved treatments); FDA filing planned 2026; Stock up ~15%; Presented at MDA Conference

title: Biomx Stock Surges 98.29%
headline: Biomx (PHGE) was the top biotech gainer on May 28, rising 98.29% with catalyst unclear from available reports.
key_facts: Stock gain: 98.29%; Top biotech industry gainer May 28; Catalyst not identified

title: ASCO 2026 Abstract Drops Show Merck, BioNTech, Lilly Data
headline: Clinical trial abstracts released ahead of ASCO 2026 conference gave early looks at datasets from Merck, BioNTech, Eli Lilly, and Moderna cancer programs.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 abstracts posted; Companies: Merck, BioNTech, Eli Lilly, Moderna; Akeso PD-1/VEGF bispecific plenary flagged as high-stakes; BioPharma Dive '5 data snapshots' feature

title: Trump Drug Pricing Order Details: 80% Price Cuts Named
headline: Trump's most-favored-nation drug pricing executive order details emerged, naming specific drugs including AstraZeneca's Baxfendy and Novo Nordisk's Awiqli with price cuts up to 80%.
key_facts: Named drugs: Baxfendy (AstraZeneca, hypertension), Awiqli (Novo Nordisk, insulin); Price cuts cited up to 80%; Novo Nordisk, Pfizer, J&J premarket declines; Executive order details being revealed
